name: @broadsheet/voice
description: Voice substrate plugin for broadsheet — discovers HA conversation agents + TTS/STT providers, routes utterances HA-native-first with LLM fall-through, surfaces a transcript pane + push-to-talk inside broadsheet.

scripts.build: echo 'voice is built THROUGH @broadsheet/core (core imports it via the plugin registry) — no standalone build' && exit 0
